channel.title: LeJOS on Anthony I. Joseph
channel.description: Recent content in LeJOS on Anthony I. Joseph

item.title: Installing LeJOS for Mindstorms NXT on Windows 8
item.description: So I had to deviate a little from the installation instructions to get LeJOS working on Windows 8, especially on a 64 bit operating system: Install a 32-bit version (ie x86) of Java JDK from the Oracle website: http://www.oracle.com/technetwork/java/javase/downloads/index.html Install the RobotC NXT drivers from the RobotC site, more than likely the 64bit version: http://www.robotc.net/download/lego/ Install the latest LeJOS .exe version of the setup program from Sourceforge and the JDK and the drivers should be detected automatically!
